caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain, dark background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top with small floral patterns and a dark beaded necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to her neckline. In the first frame, she is mid-sentence with her mouth open. As the sequence progresses, she closes her mouth, pauses with a neutral expression, and then begins speaking again, with her mouth open in the final frame. A small logo featuring a stylized sun and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower corners of the frames. The camera remains stationary in a medium close-up shot, focusing on her upper body and face throughout the clip.
